author: anon-581fd578
content: Delivered: Replaced white rectangle uploads with actual glyph rasterization via CosmicTextEngine::rasterize_glyph(). Added text_fragment field to ShapedGlyph and PositionedGlyph to carry per-glyph character data through the pipeline. Added GlyphKey parallel vec to BatchBuilder for proper cache key construction with real glyph_id and font_hash. Atlas UVs now correctly map to individual rasterized glyphs. 381 tests pass, zero clippy warnings.
